name: spielos
description: Turn coding sessions into publishable posts, threads, and blog drafts without leaving your agent workflow.

interface.longDescription: SpielOS is a session-as-content infrastructure for founders and builders. It captures your actual build sessions—coding, debugging, shipping—and extracts publish-ready posts for X, LinkedIn, and your blog. No context switching. No content creation. You stay in builder mode; the pipeline handles distribution.
defaultPrompt: Read this PDF and turn it into an X thread.
